overview: Indi Negocio Livre is a comprehensive, multi-tenant, mobile-first business management web app for herbal product distributors. It features inventory management, sales tracking, customer management with body composition history, purchase orders, and a public marketing page — all built on the Internet Computer with Motoko backend and React frontend.
features: Multi-tenant business profiles with strict data isolation
Role-based access (Super Admin, Admin, Staff, Referral User)
Inventory management with FIFO, multi-warehouse, loaner stock
Sales and purchase order management with return flows
Customer management with body composition, goals, medical issues
Receipt PDF generation with WhatsApp sharing
Public marketing page with demo lead form
4 selectable UI themes (Dark, Minimalist, Herbal, Punk)
